message:
feat(core): mission tx lifecycle, BOCPD telemetry, watchdog warnings, multi-provider CAUT, allocator crate

Mission Transaction (Tx) types (plan.rs):
- Full 2PC-style transaction lifecycle: MissionTxState with Planned → Prepared
  → Committing → Committed/Failed → Compensating → Compensated
- Kill switch levels (Off/SafeMode/HardStop)
- TxPrepareOutcome, TxCommitOutcome, TxCommitStepOutcome, TxCompensationOutcome
- Schema-versioned contract (MISSION_TX_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1)
- ~560 lines of domain types with serde support

BOCPD telemetry (bocpd.rs):
- BocpdTelemetry struct tracking panes_registered, panes_unregistered,
  observations, change_points_detected counters
- BocpdTelemetrySnapshot for serializable export
- Counter instrumentation across register/unregister/observe paths

Watchdog warning integration (watchdog.rs):
- WarningProbeOutcome enum for structured warning queries
- warning_status_from_line() keyword classifier (hung/critical/degraded)
- warning_status_from_lines() aggregator folding into HealthStatus
- MuxHealthSample extended with watchdog_warnings + warning_count fields
- MockWezterm gains set_watchdog_warnings/set_watchdog_warning_error

CautService multi-provider expansion (caut.rs):
- Anthropic + Google service variants alongside OpenAI
- is_anthropic_slug()/is_google_slug() CLI input matchers
- from_cli_input/from_provider/provider_hint updated for all three providers
- mcp.rs parse_caut_service now delegates to CautService::from_cli_input

Streaming seqno anomaly detection (tailer.rs):
- StreamingBridge tracks last_mux_seqno per pane
- note_output_seqno() detects out-of-order or jumped sequence numbers
- Anomalies emit overflow GAP markers for downstream ingestion
- Gap/Ended events properly reset seqno tracking

Allocator crate (frankenterm-alloc):
- New workspace crate keeping unsafe allocator wiring out of frankenterm-core
- Optional jemalloc feature via tikv-jemallocator
- AllocatorBackend enum for diagnostics

Other fixes:
- differential_snapshot.rs: if/else-if → if/if for scrollback changes
- policy.rs + workflows.rs: decision_type strings match enum variants
  (PolicyEvaluation, WorkflowStep)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ resolver = "2"

     "crates/frankenterm",
     "crates/frankenterm-core",
+    "crates/frankenterm-alloc",
     "fuzz",
     # FrankenTerm crates (ex-WezTerm, owned in-tree)
     "frankenterm/async_ossl",
@@ -45,7 +46,12 @@ exclude = [
 # Limit default workspace operations (check/clippy/test) to the ft crates.
 # Vendored WezTerm-derived crates are still built as dependencies, but aren't
 # clippy-linted as primary targets under `cargo clippy --all-targets`.
-default-members = ["crates/frankenterm", "crates/frankenterm-core", "fuzz"]
+default-members = [
+    "crates/frankenterm",
+    "crates/frankenterm-core",
+    "crates/frankenterm-alloc",
+    "fuzz",
+]
 
 # Crate boundary rules:
 # - frankenterm-core: business logic only (no UI/transport deps by default)
@@ -212,6 +218,10 @@ clap = { version = "4.5.54", features = ["derive", "env"] }
 # Database
 rusqlite = { version = "0.38.0", features = ["bundled", "backup", "functions"] }
 
+# Allocator (optional)
+tikv-jemallocator = "0.6.1"
+tikv-jemalloc-ctl = { version = "0.6.1", features = ["stats"] }
+
 # Pattern matching
 aho-corasick = "1.1.4"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
@@ -403,6 +413,7 @@ franken-agent-detection = "0.1.0"
 
 # Internal crates
 frankenterm-core = { path = "crates/frankenterm-core" }
+frankenterm-alloc = { path = "crates/frankenterm-alloc" }
 
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = "z"     # Optimize for size

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-alloc"
+description = "Allocator and per-pane arena helpers for FrankenTerm"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["allocator", "jemalloc", "frankenterm"]
+categories = ["development-tools"]
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[features]
+default = []
+jemalloc = ["dep:tikv-jemallocator", "dep:tikv-jemalloc-ctl"]
+
+[dependencies]
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tikv-jemallocator = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+tikv-jemalloc-ctl = { workspace = true, optional = true }

@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 frankenterm-core.workspace = true
+frankenterm-alloc = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 clap.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
@@ -59,6 +60,7 @@ sync = ["frankenterm-core/sync"]
 asupersync-runtime = ["frankenterm-core/asupersync-runtime"]
 semantic-search = ["frankenterm-core/semantic-search"]
 redis-session = ["frankenterm-core/redis-session"]
+jemalloc = ["dep:frankenterm-alloc", "frankenterm-alloc/jemalloc"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 assert_cmd = "2.1.2"
